output.summary: Causal chunked eval-then-train TTT on validation shards combines int5 quantization, EMA/adaptive pruning, and exclusive self-attention in later layers.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Validation-only shards are processed sequentially: each chunk is evaluated before any training, then training runs on that chunk without re-evaluating tokens.
techniques: Chunked eval-then-train causal TTT on validation shards
Int5 quantization with EMA and adaptive pruning for model sizing
Exclusive self-attention plus SmearGate on top layers
